title: Workhorse Group Inc (WKHS) Q2 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Truck Shipments
text: Workhorse Group reported record truck shipments in Q2 2025 with 32 trucks delivered, significantly higher than prior periods. The company reported revenue of $5.7 million and secured 36 purchase orders for W56 step vans during the quarter. As of June 30, 2025, Workhorse had $2.2 million in cash and cash equivalents with restricted cash of $22.53 million. The company reported negative working capital of $9.8 million and accumulated deficit of $888.78 million. However, cash and restricted cash improved to $24.7 million due to $34.1 million from financing activities, primarily from new convertible notes. The company's liquidity position includes $39.5 million in highly dilutive convertible notes. Management flagged substantial doubt about the company's ability to continue as a going concern. In connection with its proposed transaction with Motiv, Workhorse received approximately $25 million in funding from Motiv's controlling investor, including a $20 million sale leaseback transaction and $5 million secured convertible note financing.
